text: Subcontractors involved with 'Finish' scopes shall follow the Punch Process. After a specific area is deemed complete by the Contractor in accordance with the Contract Documents, a punchlist will be created for that area that will be distributed to the Subcontractor. Subcontractor is responsible to correct all 'open' items from the punchlist(s) that are related to their scope of work. This includes punchlist  items  created  and  issued  by  Contractor,  the  Owner,  Architect,  Engineer,  and/or  the Interior Designer(s).
